overall.description: First-person exploration through the Arasaka Corporation building in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from dark neon-lit corridors through a modern corporate hallway into a traditional Japanese-style meeting room with red ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corporate corridor with neon red doorway

events.description: passes through the red-lit doorway frame into the Arasaka lobby area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dark corridor toward the illuminated Arasaka sign

entered.detail: glowing red rectangular door frame marking the corridor entrance
large illuminated white Arasaka corporate logo on the far wall
dark polished walls lining the narrow corridor
highly polished dark floor reflecting the red and white lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dark corporate corridor with highly reflective flooring. The camera approaches and passes through a glowing red neon door frame, revealing the illuminated Arasaka corporate logo ahead. The environment is empty and silent, with polished dark walls creating an enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate atrium hallway with seating areas

agents.ego_description: traversing the long corporate hallway, passing white benches and upper floor railings

entered.detail: modern white rectangular seating benches lining both sides of the hallway
glass and metal railings of the upper floor overlooking the main hallway
linear fluorescent light fixtures running along the ceiling
dark elevator doors with illuminated call buttons

segments.scene_description: Moving through a wide corporate atrium hallway with white benches on both sides and upper floor balconies visible above. The space features modern elevator doors and linear ceiling lighting. The Arasaka sign and red doorway are left behind as the camera progresses deeper into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese meeting room with sunken floor

events.description: enters the red-lit traditional Japanese room with tatami mats and low tables
slows pace to observe the room details while circling the central table

agents.ego_description: exploring the traditional Japanese room, walking around the sunken seating area and observing the interior details

entered.detail: traditional Japanese woven mat flooring covering the room
dark wooden rectangular table at sitting height in the center of the room
circular white floor cushions arranged around the low table
long rectangular red neon light fixtures illuminating the ceiling
traditional Japanese paper and wood partition walls
recessed seating area with steps leading down to the main table

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dramatically lit traditional Japanese meeting room bathed in red neon light. The space features tatami mat flooring, a sunken central area with a low wooden table and round cushions, and shoji screen walls. The camera explores the room, moving around the central furniture and taking in the contrast between the modern corporate building and this traditional interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, oppressive corporate corridor into a brightly lit traditional Japanese sanctuary. It begins in a narrow, silent hallway with reflective floors, gliding through a glowing red neon door frame toward a prominent Arasaka logo. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a wide, modern atrium characterized by white benches, linear ceiling lighting, and upper-floor balconies. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera enters a meeting room bathed in deep red neon light, transitioning from the sterile corporate architecture to an interior of tatami mats and shoji screens. Finally, the movement slows to explore the sunken central area and low wooden table, emphasizing the contrast between the high-tech building and the traditional aesthetic.
